tagline: Syncing comments on foreign tables is now in Beta.
what_it_does: Syncing comments on foreign tables is now in Beta. Lakehouse Federation can sync table and column comments from supported external data sources to foreign tables in Unity Catalog. Synced comments appear in table metadata, including Catalog Explorer, DESCRIBE, and DESCRIBE EXTENDED output.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Syncing comments on foreign tables is now in Beta.
